_comment: Role assignment rules. Each rule has a unique id. Edit freely and run !roles reload to apply without restart.

rules.description: Grants 'Regular' after 50 messages in 30 days AND at least 7 days in the server.

notify.message: You have earned your place here. The realm acknowledges you as a Regular — welcome to the inner circle.

rules.description: Grants 'Active' after 200 messages in 30 days AND at least 14 days in the server. Replaces Regular.

notify.message: You have been persistent. I notice those who do not wither. You are now marked as Active.

rules.description: Example: grants 'Veteran' after 500 messages AND 60 days as a server member.

notify.message: You have endured. Most do not last this long in my realm. Veteran — wear it.

rules.description: Example: grants 'Off-Topic Regular' after 30 messages specifically in #off-topic within 14 days.

notify.message: You spend a curious amount of time in the off-topic halls. I have noticed. Wear this role accordingly.

_trigger_fields.count: Number of messages required in the window
_trigger_fields.channel: Channel name to restrict counting to, or null for server-wide
_trigger_fields.min_days_member: User must have been in the server at least this many days (uses Discord joined_at — works even before the bot was installed). null = no minimum.
_trigger_fields.min_days_observed: User must have been seen by the bot for at least this many days (uses when the bot first recorded them). null = no minimum.

_action_fields.grant_role: Exact role name to grant (must exist in Discord)
_action_fields.remove_roles: List of role names to remove when granting (for role upgrades)
_action_fields.once: If true, fires only once per user. If false, re-fires if they re-qualify after losing the role.

_notify_fields.dm: If true, send a DM to the user when the role is granted
_notify_fields.message: The DM text — written in the persona's voice
_notify_fields.channel_id: Optional channel ID to post a public announcement (null = quiet)
